indicators.name: kitchen island
indicators.rationale: A kitchen island can serve as a prep area and provide additional counter space.

indicators.name: stainless steel sink
indicators.rationale: A sink is essential for food preparation and cleaning.

indicators.name: granite countertops
indicators.rationale: Granite countertops are durable and easy to clean, ideal for food preparation.

indicators.name: oven
indicators.rationale: An oven is necessary for baking and roasting.

indicators.name: stove
indicators.rationale: A stove is essential for cooking.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring can be slippery and difficult to clean, especially when wet.

reasoning_summary: The space has some key elements for cooking, such as a kitchen island, sink, and oven, but lacks a stove and hardwood flooring could pose a challenge for cleaning.
